summary: Pushback on workstation framing; wants thin-client, not workstation
detailed_context: Nick explicitly stated he wants the Mac as a thin client accessed via Telegram/Tailscale. The AI responded 'That works' but then described the topology as 'Mac as your workstation,' contradicting the thin-client intent. Nick now questions why the AI would suggest moving away from his core concept. This is a direct course-correction—the AI misframed the architecture despite appearing to endorse it. Nick is confused/correcting, not angry, but clearly dissatisfied with the misalignment.
